sc.political.s: FEC records 2020-2024: approximately 45% Democratic, 55% Republican donations.
sc.dei.s: IBM published DEI roadmap 2021; HRC CEI scores 90+ 2020-2024; funded inclusion programs.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement actions or named pollution events; disclosed Scope 1-2 emissions; no science-based targets verified.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings; no OSHA fatalities; no named class-action lawsuits on record.
sc.animals.s: Not applicable; technology services company with no animal testing or animal-derived products.
sc.guns.s: No firearms manufacture or retail; technology and business services provider.
sc.privacy.s: No major HIBP breaches or FTC privacy enforcement actions; standard enterprise privacy policy.
